zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Picot於1155年出生在英國英格蘭肯特米爾頓時，她的父親Ralph de Picot Sheriff of Kent45歲，母親Ethelreda Port45歲。她於1175年與Gilbert de Isaac Malet在英國英格蘭肯特米爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1220年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 馬利特享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Picot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Francois, Jacques, Jeanpaul, Luc, Pascal, Yves.  Spanish Esperanza, Aida, Alicia, Ana, Felipe, Luis.
French: from Old French picot ‘pointed object, pickaxe’, a nickname for someone who used such an implement. This surname is also found in Haiti.
Catalan: nickname from Valencian dialect picot ‘(sheep or goat) bell’.

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

variants.name: Picotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Honore, Andre, Jacques, Serge.
Altered form of French Picot , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Picot was born in 1155, in Milton, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph de Picot Sheriff of Kent, was 45 and her mother, Ethelreda Port, was 45. She married Gilbert de Isaac Malet in 1175, in Milton, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1220, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Picot est née en 1155, à Milton, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Picot Sheriff of Kent, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Ethelreda Port, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Isaac Malet en 1175, à Milton, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Picotが1155年にイギリスイギリスケントミルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Picot Sheriff of Kentは45歳，母Ethelreda Portは45歳であった。1175年にイギリスイギリスケントミルトンでGilbert de Isaac Maletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1220年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Picot(이)가 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 미턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Picot Sheriff of Kent(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ethelreda Port(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 미턴에서 Gilbert de Isaac Malet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Picot родилась в 1155 г. в местности милтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph de Picot Sheriff of Kent было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Ethelreda Port, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Isaac Malet в 1175 г. в местности милтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.
